wondering who would have the strength to stay with him well chicone was right on his wheel Lander came over to join the fun yukarthy rolled the dice never that far away yombo visma Wilco kelderman closing down the Gap Primos roglitch always in the shadows well two great Stars step out of the Shadows at exactly the right moment and that's precisely what we had at the end big pickup tail gagan more drama on this fabulous race another shark's tooth profile to be enjoyed here on the torello adriatico a race like no other we look forward to say six at our finale on Sunday foreign
